strategy: He is damage-immune under a -300% Invulnerability aura until you enter his code: four attacks at specific pip costs, in order.
He reveals the first code number on Round 2, and each Sunken Sam minion you defeat reveals the next number, so kill the Sams to unlock the full code.
Match each revealed pip cost by hitting him with a spell of exactly that many pips, in sequence. A wrong pip cost resets you to the first number.
Codes include 0-pip entries (use a 0-pip wand hit) and values up to 10, so keep low-pip and wand spells in your deck to hit every cost.
Once all four are correct the aura drops (he casts a harmless Supernova), then blade up and finish him with Death damage, he takes +15% from it.
cheatNotes: He starts immune to all damage under a -300% Invulnerability aura, you cannot hurt him until you crack his code.
The code is four specific pip costs he must be hit with in order. He reveals the first digit on Round 2 and one more each time a Sunken Sam dies.
The fourth correct hit drops his invulnerability, he casts a damage-less Supernova and now you can kill him.
A wrong pip cost resets the sequence back to the first number, track carefully.
